title: Workaround to filter on sub-item dates in Dashboards
excerpt: I have a date column and number column in sub-items. I need to filter on the data there in my Dashboard Charts. Do you know of any creative workarounds to show that data, filtered on only certain dates?

posts.author: cryptomark (Mark Berry)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a date column and number column in sub-items. I need to filter on the data there in my Dashboard Charts. Do you know of any creative workarounds to show that data, filtered on only certain dates?
